author: Elvira
artistdescription: Elvira is a multi-media artist whose collaborative process is inherent to the work.

sections.value: Collaborative Engagement. Sharing artistic techniques as a way to build a sense of community. This residency broke down conventional boundaries between craft and art. Integrating and examining traditional categories of “artisanal” and “artistic” is a key element.

value.description: A sample 1080p video using 5 second video clips stitched together to create a one minute video. We use this for benchmarks and testing. You can find out more about our recent speed and performance update which used this video here
